Usage: heyfood search [OPTIONS]

 Search restaurants near coordinates, a saved default location, or a named place.

╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --query   -q      TEXT     Restaurant search text.                                                                   │
│ --lat             FLOAT    Latitude (with --lng). Overrides saved location.                                          │
│ --lng             FLOAT    Longitude (with --lat). Overrides saved location.                                         │
│ --near            TEXT     Place name to search near, e.g. "Fresno, CA".                                             │
│ --radius          FLOAT    Search radius in miles (default 5, or the saved location's radius).                       │
│ --limit           INTEGER  Maximum restaurants. [default: 10]                                                        │
│ --json                     Print stable JSON.                                                                        │
│ --raw                      Deprecated alias for --json.                                                              │
│ --help                     Show this message and exit.                                                               │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
